_comment: Override knobs for src/retrieval/policy.ts. Anything omitted falls back to DEFAULT_POLICY in code. Set TUBEROSA_RETRIEVAL_POLICY=/abs/path.json to point elsewhere. Phase 4 knobs (additive): useTaskProfiles, taskProfiles.<taskType>.{sourceWeights,itemTypeBoosts}, useCoverageProfiles, coverageGlobal, coverageProfiles.<taskType>.{file,symbol,error,technology,businessArea}, graphHopWeights.{target,seed,depth2}, relationKindMultipliers.<relationType>, graphMaxHops (1 or 2). Generate calibrated weights with `pnpm run calibrate-fusion` — the script writes the patch here automatically. Phase 2/3 knobs still apply: useFreshnessMap, freshnessGlobal, freshnessPolicy, sourceWeights (now includes 'worktree' — default 1.30, highest), hardSignalBoost (now includes 'worktree'), taskItemTypeBoosts, duplicateDetector*, piiRedaction, domainMismatch, suppressionEnabled, useOntology, useItemTypeInference, useAstExtractor. Phase 3 (context-fit hardening): contextFit.weights.{top1,top3Avg,coverage,worktreeMatch} composite weights (defaults 0.55/0.20/0.15/0.10; worktreeMatch now populated by Phase 5 worktree provider when files match), contextFit.thresholds.{ready,needsConfirmation} status bucket thresholds (defaults 0.72/0.45). Rerank failures fall back to fused order and force fitStatus='needs_confirmation' with reason 'reranker_unavailable' — no config knob. Phase 5 (worktree provider): runtime knobs are env-based — TUBEROSA_WORKTREE_ENABLED (default true), TUBEROSA_WORKTREE_MAX_FILES (default 50), TUBEROSA_WORKTREE_MAX_MTIME_AGE_HOURS (default 72).
